status.cellBackground:
{{(() => { const tableData = Table1.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => (currentRow.status === 'NEW_LEAD' ? '#E3F2FD' : 
  currentRow.status === 'CONTACTED' ? '#FFF8E1' : 
  currentRow.status === 'PROCESSING' ? '#FFF3E0' : 
  currentRow.status === 'COMPLETED' ? '#E8F5E9' : 
  currentRow.status === 'REJECTED' ? '#FFEBEE' : '#F5F5F5')) : currentRow.status === 'NEW_LEAD' ? '#E3F2FD' : 
  currentRow.status === 'CONTACTED' ? '#FFF8E1' : 
  currentRow.status === 'PROCESSING' ? '#FFF3E0' : 
  currentRow.status === 'COMPLETED' ? '#E8F5E9' : 
  currentRow.status === 'REJECTED' ? '#FFEBEE' : '#F5F5F5' })()}}
